posts.author: psperry (Accidental Selfie )
posts.cookedHtml:
I have an automation that looks like below. When triggered, it does a few things, one of them is to create a new item on another board with the info in the current item.

The problem is that the files (documents) almost never propagate to the new item and I am left copying them manually. This is a relatively new development. Any help will be appreciated.

AC60A862-D7E6-4768-AA7F-24C0BCF809181612×637 59.9 KB

posts.author: YuvrajSingh (Yuvraj Singh Rajput)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @psperry

You can use Copy Files Pro.

It have features like copying files on same item’s file columns, different item’s file columns and items present on different board.
